sn35.110:1.1: There the Blessed One said, “Monks, I will teach you clingable phenomena & clinging.
sn35.110:1.2: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.”
sn35.110:1.3: “And which, monks, are clingable phenomena? Which is the clinging?
sn35.110:1.5: Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the clinging there...
sn35.110:1.8: Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the clinging there.
sn35.110:1.9: “These are called clingable phenomena. This is the clinging.”
